title: Phellosperma guelzowiana
taxonomy: Phellosperma guelzowiana is classified in the family Menispermaceae. This family consists of about 100 species of flowering plants. Phellosperma guelzowiana is native to New Caledonia. The plant is a type of climbing vine. It is part of the order Ranunculales in the broader classification.
